title: Wrendale Designs by Hannah Dale Signature Stationery - Stationery Box
features: Ultimate gift for a stationery lover.
Includes a lined notepad, to-do pad, bookmark, sticky note block and sticker sheets.
Presented in an illustrated gift box with magnetic closure.
description: Our luxury stationery set is the ultimate gift for any lover of beautiful stationery and comes in an illustrated gift box with a magnetic closure which can be kept and re-used as storage. This set includes a lined notepad, to-do pad, gold foiled bookmark with a grosgrain ribbon, a sticky note block and 2 sticker sheets including 24 stickers in 6 different designs. Box measures 224mm x 157mm x 39mm. Plastic free gift packaging, sustainably sourced from responsibly managed forests.
